pattern: Sweep a split point left to right tracking zeros-in-left and ones-in-right; the score is zeros_left + ones_right, optimized in a single pass.
hints: Count all ones in the string upfront; as you sweep the split leftward, each '0' adds to the left score and each '1' consumed into the left subtracts from the right score.
Try every valid split point (between index 1 and len-1) and track the running maximum.
You can avoid recomputing ones-in-right from scratch at each split by maintaining it as total_ones minus ones already in the left part.

edge_inputs.description: best split is at the very first character
best split is near the end
single zero on left, all ones on right

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(2, min(size, 500))
    s = ''.join(rng.choice('01') for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
